title: HVAC Capacity Optimizer
description: Industrial-grade tool to optimize HVAC system capacity based on load, efficiency, and environmental factors, aligned with ISO 50001 and Lean Six Sigma principles.

inputs.label: Cooling Load
inputs.businessContext: Total sensible and latent heat load from building, equipment, and occupants (ISO 52000).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total sensible and latent heat load from building, equipment, and occupants (ISO 52000).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bina, ekipman ve kullanıcılardan kaynaklanan toplam duyulur ve gizli ısı yükü (ISO 52000).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte sensible und latente Wärmelast von Gebäude, Ausrüstung und Personen (ISO 52000).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Charge totale sensible et latente du bâtiment, des équipements et des occupants (ISO 52000).
businessContext_i18n.es: Carga total sensible y latente del edificio, equipo y ocupantes (ISO 52000).
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي الحمل الحراري المحسوس والكامن من المبنى والمعدات والأشخاص (ISO 52000).

inputs.label: Heating Load
inputs.businessContext: Total heat loss from building envelope and ventilation (ASHRAE Handbook).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total heat loss from building envelope and ventilation (ASHRAE Handbook).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bina kabuğu ve havalandırmadan kaynaklanan toplam ısı kaybı (ASHRAE El Kitabı).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamter Wärmeverlust durch Gebäudehülle und Lüftung (ASHRAE-Handbuch).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Perte de chaleur totale de l'enveloppe du bâtiment et de la ventilation (ASHRAE Handbook).
businessContext_i18n.es: Pérdida total de calor por envolvente y ventilación (Manual ASHRAE).
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي فقدان الحرارة من غلاف المبنى والتهوية (ASHRAE Handbook).

inputs.label: System Type
inputs.businessContext: HVAC system configuration affecting capacity and efficiency curves.

businessContext_i18n.en: HVAC system configuration affecting capacity and efficiency curves.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kapasite ve verim eğrilerini etkileyen HVAC sistem konfigürasyonu.
businessContext_i18n.de: HLK-Systemkonfiguration, die Kapazitäts- und Effizienzkurven beeinflusst.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Configuration du système CVC affectant les courbes de capacité et d'efficacité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Configuración del sistema HVAC que afecta las curvas de capacidad y eficiencia.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تكوين نظام التدفئة والتهوية وتكييف الهواء الذي يؤثر على منحنيات السعة والكفاءة.

inputs.label: Ambient Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Outdoor dry-bulb temperature for design conditions (ISO 15927).

businessContext_i18n.en: Outdoor dry-bulb temperature for design conditions (ISO 15927).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tasarım koşulları için dış hava kuru termometre sıcaklığı (ISO 15927).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température sèche extérieure pour les conditions de conception (ISO 15927).
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura de bulbo seco exterior para condiciones de diseño (ISO 15927).
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة حرارة الهواء الخارجي الجاف لظروف التصميم (ISO 15927).

inputs.label: Relative Humidity
inputs.businessContext: Indoor relative humidity setpoint, impacts latent load and coil performance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Indoor relative humidity setpoint, impacts latent load and coil performance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İç ortam bağıl nem set değeri, gizli yük ve serpantin performansını etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Relative Luftfeuchtigkeit im Innenraum, beeinflusst die latente Last und die Spulenleistung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Consigne d'humidité relative intérieure, impacte la charge latente et la performance du serpentin.
businessContext_i18n.es: Humedad relativa interior de consigna, impacta la carga latente y el rendimiento de la batería.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نقطة ضبط الرطوبة النسبية الداخلية، تؤثر على الحمل الكامن وأداء الملف.

inputs.label: Efficiency Ratio (EER/COP)
inputs.businessContext: Current system efficiency; baseline for improvement (ANSI/AHRI 210/240).

businessContext_i18n.en: Current system efficiency; baseline for improvement (ANSI/AHRI 210/240).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mevcut sistem verimi; iyileştirme için temel (ANSI/AHRI 210/240).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Efficacité actuelle du système ; base de référence pour l'amélioration (ANSI/AHRI 210/240).
businessContext_i18n.es: Eficiencia actual del sistema; línea base para mejora (ANSI/AHRI 210/240).
businessContext_i18n.ar: كفاءة النظام الحالية؛ خط الأساس للتحسين (ANSI/AHRI 210/240).

inputs.label: Airflow Rate
inputs.businessContext: Supply air volume, critical for capacity and distribution (WERC DC guidelines).

businessContext_i18n.en: Supply air volume, critical for capacity and distribution (WERC DC guidelines).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Besleme havası hacmi, kapasite ve dağıtım için kritik (WERC DC yönergeleri).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zuluftvolumen, entscheidend für Kapazität und Verteilung (WERC DC-Richtlinien).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Volume d'air soufflé, critique pour la capacité et la distribution (directives WERC DC).
businessContext_i18n.es: Caudal de aire de impulsión, crítico para capacidad y distribución (directrices WERC DC).
businessContext_i18n.ar: حجم هواء الإمداد، ضروري للسعة والتوزيع (إرشادات WERC DC).

inputs.label: Duct Leakage Factor
inputs.businessContext: Estimated leakage as percentage of total airflow; affects effective capacity.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated leakage as percentage of total airflow; affects effective capacity.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam hava akışının yüzdesi olarak tahmini kaçak; efektif kapasiteyi etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzte Leckage als Prozentsatz des gesamten Luftstroms; beeinflusst die effektive Kapazität.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fuite estimée en pourcentage du débit d'air total ; affecte la capacité effective.
businessContext_i18n.es: Fuga estimada como porcentaje del caudal total; afecta la capacidad efectiva.
businessContext_i18n.ar: التسرب المقدر كنسبة مئوية من إجمالي تدفق الهواء؛ يؤثر على السعة الفعلية.

rules.message: Both cooling and heating loads cannot be positive simultaneously for a single zone; check design conditions.
Airflow must be consistent with thermal load; consider minimum ventilation requirements.
Efficiency ratio out of typical range; verify input.
High duct leakage detected; consider sealing to improve effective capacity.

thresholds.message: System capacity is below 90% of load; risk of thermal discomfort and equipment strain.
Efficiency ratio low; consider maintenance or upgrade to reduce energy waste.
Relative humidity outside comfort band; latent capacity may be insufficient.

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
